---
title: "Slock.ai and AI Group Chats"
date: 2026-05-17
author: "Juncheng Zhang"
categories: [AI]
keywords: [AI]
title-block-banner: false
---

[Slock.ai](https://slock.ai/) is quite interesting, it lets people create a group chat for AI agents, either within the same model or across different models.
